base_http_status.name: HTTP Status Code Check
base_http_status.description: Probe a URL and check HTTP status code. 200 = account exists, 404/other = not found.

base_http_message.name: HTTP Body Message Check
base_http_message.description: Probe a URL and check response body for presence/absence strings.

base_http_headers.name: HTTP Headers Check
base_http_headers.description: Probe a URL and check response headers for expected patterns.

xenforo.name: XenForo Forum
xenforo.description: Generic XenForo forum engine. Covers hundreds of XenForo-based forums.

discourse.name: Discourse Forum
discourse.description: Discourse forum engine. Presence: user profile elements. Absence: 'not found' messages.

wordpress_author.name: WordPress Author Page
wordpress_author.description: WordPress author archive pages. 200 = author has posts.

phpbb.name: phpBB Forum
phpbb.description: Generic phpBB forum engine. Profile search via memberlist.php. Presence: user found. Absence: 'No members found'.

absence_strs: No members found for this search criterion.

vbulletin.name: vBulletin Forum
vbulletin.description: Generic vBulletin forum engine. Profile via member.php. Absence: 'does not have a profile' in multiple languages.

absence_strs: This user has not registered and therefore does not have a profile to view.
